title: DashBuddy Rule Format
description: Schema for DashBuddy screen matcher, click classifier, and notification classifier rule files. See ADR-0001 for design rationale.

$schema.description: JSON Schema reference for IDE support.

platform_id.description: Provenance metadata identifying this rule file's source platform (e.g. 'doordash.driver', 'uber.driver'). Runtime filtering uses Platform.wire derived from rule IDs, not this field.

screens.description: Screen matching rules. Evaluated in priority order; first match wins.

clicks.description: Click classification rules. Evaluated against a single tapped UiNode.

screenRule.description: A screen matching rule. Uses the 5-phase pipeline: bind -> reject -> require -> parse -> validate. Can be single-target (require at top level) or multi-branch (branches array).

description.description: Human-readable description of what this rule matches. Ignored by the compiler.

overrideable.description: CI/CD gate: when false, the split-repo pipeline requires human review before shipping changes to this rule. Not enforced at runtime. Default: true.

reject.description: Phase 2: Fail-fast negative checks. Any match skips this rule/branch.

require.description: Phase 3: Positive match condition. Must pass for the rule to match.

validate.description: Phase 5: Assertions on parsed field values.

effects.description: Side effects to execute on successful match.

branches.description: Multiple matching paths. First branch to pass all phases wins.

branchObject.description: A single branch within a multi-branch screen rule. Must have 'require'.

clickBranchObject.description: A single branch within a multi-branch click rule.

screenIs.description: Only match when the active screen target equals this value.

intent.description: Output intent string for this branch.

notificationBranchObject.description: A single branch within a multi-branch notification rule.

intent.description: Output intent string for this branch.

clickRule.description: A click classification rule. Predicate operates on the single tapped UiNode. Supports the full pipeline: bind -> reject -> require -> parse -> validate -> effects.

description.description: Human-readable description of what this rule matches. Ignored by the compiler.

overrideable.description: CI/CD gate: when false, the split-repo pipeline requires human review before shipping changes to this rule. Not enforced at runtime. Default: true.

screenIs.description: Only match when the active screen target equals this value.

intent.description: Output intent string. Auto-derived from rule ID if omitted.

reject.description: Fail-fast negative checks. Any match skips this rule/branch.

require.description: Positive match condition. Must pass for the rule to match.

branches.description: Multiple matching paths. First branch to pass all phases wins.

notificationRule.description: A notification classification rule. Supports the full pipeline: reject -> require -> parse -> validate -> effects.

description.description: Human-readable description of what this rule matches. Ignored by the compiler.

overrideable.description: CI/CD gate: when false, the split-repo pipeline requires human review before shipping changes to this rule. Not enforced at runtime. Default: true.

intent.description: Output intent string. Auto-derived from rule ID if omitted.

reject.description: Fail-fast negative checks. Any match skips this rule/branch.

require.description: Positive match condition. Must pass for the rule to match.

branches.description: Multiple matching paths. First branch to pass all phases wins.

stateBlock.description: Contextual flow and mode state declared by the rule.

bindBlock.description: Phase 1: Named variable bindings. Keys are binding names; referenced as $name in later phases.

find.description: Node predicate to locate the target node.

optional.description: If true, null result doesn't disqualify the rule. Default: false.

parseBlock.description: Phase 4: Output type and field extraction specification.

as.description: Output type. Determines which ParsedFields subtype is produced from the extracted fields.

fields.description: Named fields to extract. Each value is a parse expression.

notificationParseBlock.description: Parse block for notification rules. Extracts fields from notification string properties using regex.

as.description: Output type. Determines which ParsedFields subtype is produced from the extracted fields.

fields.description: Named fields to extract. Each value is a notification parse expression.

notificationParseExpression.description: A parse expression that extracts a value from notification data. Can be a string literal, or an object with from/find/group/transform.

literal.description: The constant value (string, boolean, integer, or number).

oneOf.description: Extract from a notification field using regex.

find.description: Regex pattern to match within the source field.

group.description: Capture group index (0 = whole match). Default: 0.

fallback.description: Default value if extraction returns null.

notificationFieldSource.description: Notification data field to read from.

parseExpression.description: A parse expression that extracts a value from the UI tree. Can be a string literal, or an object with a primary key that determines the extraction method.

parseExpressionObject.description: Object-form parse expression. The primary key determines the extraction method.

literal.description: The constant value (string, boolean, integer, or number).

parseFind.description: Locate a single node by predicate, optionally read a property and transform.

from.description: Start search from a bound node ($name). Omit to start from tree root.

fallback.description: Default value if the expression returns null.

rejectIf.description: Null out result if the found node matches this predicate.

parseFindAll.description: Locate all matching nodes (capped at 50). Returns array of read values.

parseTextAfterLabel.description: Extract text from the sibling after a label node. Shorthand for find-by-text + sibling(offset) + read.

offset.description: Sibling offset from the label node. Default: 1.

parsePresence.description: Boolean: does a predicate match? Returns true/false.

presence.description: Tree predicate to test. Result is boolean.

parseConditionalEnum.description: If/then/else chain returning a string value.

conditionalEnum.description: Array of {if, then} cases with optional {else} fallback.

conditionalEnumCase.description: A single case in a conditionalEnum: either {if, then} or {else}.

parseEach.description: Iterate over all matching nodes, extract per-item fields. Returns array of objects.

each.description: Predicate to find iteration target nodes.

scope.description: Walk up to ancestor before extracting. Format: 'ancestor(N)'.

exclude.description: Filter out scoped nodes matching this predicate.

extract.description: Per-item field extraction. Each value is a parse expression scoped to the item node.

parseJoin.description: Concatenate multiple expressions with a separator.

join.description: Parse expressions whose string results are concatenated.

separator.description: Separator between joined values. Default: empty string.

skipNulls.description: Skip null values instead of including empty strings. Default: true.

parseCoalesce.description: Return the first non-null expression result.

coalesce.description: Parse expressions tried in order; first non-null wins.

parseSiblingOf.description: Shorthand for find -> sibling(offset) -> read -> transform.

siblingOf.description: Predicate to find the reference node.

offset.description: Sibling offset from the found node. Default: 1.

parseFromBinding.description: Read a property from a bound node with optional transform.

navigateSpec.description: Navigation from a found node. Supported: 'parent', 'ancestor(N)', 'sibling(N)', 'findChild(idSuffix)', 'findDescendant(idSuffix)'.

transformSpec.description: Value transformation. Can be a plain transform name (string), a parameterized transform (object), or a chain (array).

oneOf.description: Transform chain: apply each transform in sequence.

parameterizedTransform.description: Transform with parameters. Exactly one key (the transform name).

stripPrefixes.description: Prefixes to try; first match is removed.

index.description: Zero-based index of the segment to return.

then.description: Transform to apply to the captured value.

validateEntry.description: A validation assertion on parsed fields.

onFail.description: Behavior on assertion failure. 'skip' tries next branch; 'dropParsed' matches but discards parsed fields.

target.description: Target field name that the sum must approximately equal (sumApproxEquals).

field.description: Field name to check (fieldsLe, fieldsGe, fieldNotNull, fieldEquals).

le.description: Field name for the upper bound (fieldsLe).

ge.description: Field name for the lower bound (fieldsGe).

tolerance.description: Allowed variance for approximate comparisons. Default: 0.02.

value.description: Expected value for fieldEquals (string, number, or boolean).

effectEntry.description: A side effect to execute on successful match. Has exactly one verb key plus optional meta keys (onlyIf, dedupeKey, throttleMs).

onlyIf.description: Conditional gate: only fire if parsed field matches condition.

dedupeKey.description: Stable key for deduplication. Supports {fieldName} template interpolation.

throttleMs.description: Minimum milliseconds between firings of the same dedupeKey. Default: 500.

click.description: Click a bound node. Value is '$bindName'. Requires ACCESSIBILITY permission.

screenshot.description: Capture the current screen. Requires ACCESSIBILITY permission.

bubble.description: Post a message to the bubble HUD.

speak.description: Speak text via TTS. Requires AUDIO permission.

odometer_start.description: Start GPS mileage tracking. Requires LOCATION permission.

odometer_stop.description: Stop GPS mileage tracking. Requires LOCATION permission.

odometer_pause.description: Pause GPS mileage tracking. Requires LOCATION permission.

odometer_resume.description: Resume GPS mileage tracking. Requires LOCATION permission.

gateCondition.description: Conditional gate for effects. Evaluated against parsed fields.

transitionOverrides.description: Override default effects for state transitions. Keys are transition trigger wire names; values are arrays of effects that REPLACE (not merge with) defaults.

nodePredicate.description: Predicate operating on a single UiNode. Object with exactly one key (the predicate type).

any.description: OR: at least one predicate must match.

treePredicate.description: Predicate operating on the full UiNode tree.

exists.description: True if any node in the tree matches the node predicate.

notExists.description: True if no node in the tree matches the node predicate.

allTextContains.description: True if any node's text in the tree contains this substring (case-insensitive).

allTextContainsAll.description: True if the tree's concatenated text contains ALL of these substrings.

allTextContainsAny.description: True if the tree's concatenated text contains ANY of these substrings.

all.description: AND: all tree predicates must match.

any.description: OR: at least one tree predicate must match.

not.description: Negation: tree predicate must NOT match.

hasAction.description: Action button with this label is present (case-insensitive).

anyFieldContainsAll.description: Concatenated notification text contains ALL substrings.

anyFieldContainsAny.description: Concatenated notification text contains ANY substring.

asEnum.description: Output type determining which ParsedFields subtype is produced.
